belier.intro: The sky pulls you in two directions today. The Capricorn Moon, still bright from its recent fullness, illuminates the peak of your professional life, demanding structure and ambition. Meanwhile, the Sun in Cancer calls you back to your roots and your most private emotional world, creating a powerful tension between public duty and personal need.
belier.love: With Mercury retrograding through your emotional core, conversations with loved ones may feel like walking through a house of memories. Be gentle with your words and listen for the feelings beneath them. This is a time for mending old fences, not building new ones.
belier.work: A project may be reaching its culmination, demanding your full attention and discipline under the Capricorn moon. Yet, your focus might feel scattered, pulled towards domestic matters. Your greatest professional strength today comes from a well-tended inner foundation.
belier.energy: The cosmic cross-currents can feel draining, like a fire trying to burn brightly in a strong wind. Conserve your energy and direct it with intention rather than scattering your powerful spark.
belier.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in flashes of fire, but in the slow, deep currents of memory. Pay attention to gut feelings that bubble up from the past, as they are your most reliable compass today.
belier.mantra: My roots anchor my highest ambitions.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Full Moon rises in Capricorn, a fellow earth sign, casting a steady, illuminating light on your path. This is not a chaotic tide but a moment of profound clarity, where a long-held belief or a distant goal finally feels tangible and real. You see the summit you have been climbing, and the view is grounding.
taureau.love: Conversations about the future feel both serious and tender today. With Mercury moving backward in your communication zone, choose your words with care, letting your heart speak a language of steadfastness. It is by sharing a common philosophy of life that you build the most enduring bonds.
taureau.work: A significant project may reach its peak, or you might gain a clear perspective on your long-term career ambitions. This is a day to honor the structures you have built and the discipline you have shown. Review your progress with pride, but hold off on signing new agreements until the communicative haze lifts.
taureau.energy: The earthy harmony between the Moon and your own sign provides a deep well of resilience. Feel the supportive strength of the ground beneath your feet and nourish your body with simple, wholesome food.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition speaks with a practical voice, connecting grand philosophies to everyday reality. A truth that has been slowly forming within you now solidifies into a powerful, unshakeable knowing.
taureau.mantra: I build my beliefs on a firm foundation.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The sky is holding its breath with a nearly Full Moon in pragmatic Capricorn, illuminating the deepest chamber of your chart. This lunar light opposes the Sun in tender Cancer, creating a powerful pull between your own resources and what you share with another. You are being asked to look at the architecture of your bonds and the true nature of trust.
gemeaux.love: Discussions about shared life and finances may feel serious today, but they hold the key to deeper intimacy. It's not a day for light chatter, but for the quiet understanding that builds enduring foundations. Vulnerability becomes a strength when you allow someone to see the blueprints of your heart.
gemeaux.work: Your mind, usually quick as silver, is drawn toward deeper currents. With your ruler Mercury retrograde, review joint ventures and shared budgets rather than initiating new ones. The Capricorn Moon lends you the patience to untangle complex problems and see the underlying structure of your projects.
gemeaux.energy: The emotional depth of the day might feel heavier than your airy spirit is used to. Ground yourself with simple, tangible tasks. A steady pace will serve you better than a frantic rush.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in flashes, but in a slow, deep knowing that rises from the earth. Pay attention to the subtle dynamics of power and trust in your relationships. As Heraclitus noted, 'The hidden harmony is better than the obvious.'
gemeaux.mantra: I build strong bridges on foundations of trust.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: Your ruler, the Moon, shines at its peak in Capricorn, your opposite sign, casting a powerful light on the axis of your life. This Full Moon creates a profound tension between your private, emotional world and your public responsibilities. With Mercury retrograde in your own sign, this is a moment of culmination that asks for quiet reflection, not hasty reaction.
cancer.love: Relationships may feel like a delicate balancing act today. You crave emotional closeness, while the world seems to demand practical focus. This lunar opposition can illuminate unspoken needs between you and another. Use its clarity to understand, not to confront, finding the bridge between your heart's desires and shared duties.
cancer.work: A professional project may reach a critical turning point, demanding your full attention. The Capricorn Moon highlights your ambitions and long-term goals, urging you to build solid structures for your future. While your feelings are a valid guide, let disciplined action be your main tool for navigating the day's tasks.
cancer.energy: This cosmic push-and-pull can leave you feeling emotionally and physically stretched. Honor your need for a sanctuary where you can recharge your batteries away from the world's demands.
cancer.intuition: Your intuition speaks in two languages today: the emotional whispers of your Cancer Sun and the pragmatic wisdom of the Capricorn Moon. As Lao Tzu taught, 'The wise man is one who knows what he does not know.' Acknowledge both voices within; the truest guidance lies in their synthesis.
cancer.mantra: I honor my feelings and my duties.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: While your ruler, the Sun, travels through the quiet waters of Cancer, a potent Full Moon rises in disciplined Capricorn. This cosmic alignment illuminates your house of daily work and well-being, asking not for a grand performance, but for the quiet strength of completion. Today is about honoring the structures that support you and releasing the habits that weigh you down.
lion.love: With Mercury moving backward through your most private sector, conversations with loved ones may touch upon the past. This is not a time for blame, but for deep listening and understanding the roots of your connections. True intimacy is found in the quiet spaces between words.
lion.work: The Capricorn Full Moon brings a project to its end or a duty to its fulfillment. There is a profound satisfaction in seeing a task through, so focus on tidying up loose ends rather than launching new ventures. Your best work now is done with methodical care, away from the usual applause.
lion.energy: This earthy lunar energy may feel more serious than you are used to, grounding your fiery spirit in the practical. Honor this call for structure by tending to your body's needs with disciplined care. A long walk or a nourishing meal is more valuable than pushing for a peak performance.
lion.intuition: Your inner world is especially rich and communicative now, a hidden spring in a quiet garden. Your dreams and quiet reflections hold important clues, as your intuition speaks more clearly than any outside voice. Trust the subtle whispers from within; they are your most reliable guides.
lion.mantra: My quiet work shines its own powerful light.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The nearly Full Moon in fellow earth sign Capricorn sends a current of grounding energy, illuminating the structures you have so carefully built. It is a day for tangible results and a clear-eyed recognition of your own discipline. With your ruler Mercury in retrograde, this clarity comes not from frantic analysis, but from a quiet, internal review of what truly supports your foundations.
vierge.love: Discussions with loved ones may circle back to the past, offering a chance to heal old sensitivities with new understanding. The Capricorn Moon favors loyalty and practical gestures of affection over grand pronouncements. Your devotion is best shown through dependable, thoughtful action.
vierge.work: A long-term project may reach a significant milestone, bringing a well-deserved sense of accomplishment and pride. The cosmic climate is perfect for refining details and reviewing strategies, not for launching brand-new ventures. Trust your instincts to see what needs one final, perfecting touch before you can call it complete.
vierge.energy: Your stamina feels steady and reliable today, like the slow and patient growth of an ancient tree. Ground yourself by connecting with the earth or focusing on a methodical task that brings you peace.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition speaks in the language of feeling and memory, a quiet voice beneath the usual noise of your analytical mind. Pay attention to gut feelings related to your home and sense of security, for that is where your deepest wisdom currently resides.
vierge.mantra: My patient work now bears its beautiful fruit.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The sky pulls you in two directions today, Libra. A potent Full Moon in Capricorn illuminates your deepest foundations, your home and family life, while the Sun in Cancer shines a light on your career and public reputation. This is a moment of culmination, asking you where your true sense of security lies.
balance.love: Discussions about shared responsibilities may come to a head, as the balance between your private world and professional demands is tested. True harmony is found not in avoiding the topic, but in building a structure that supports you both. Be clear, but gentle in your words.
balance.work: With Mercury retrograde in your career sector, this Full Moon urges a review, not a revolution. Re-examine the structures of your professional life - are they truly supporting your long-term goals? Avoid signing new contracts; instead, refine existing plans with a patient, disciplined eye.
balance.energy: This cosmic tension can feel draining, pulling your airy nature between heavy earth and deep water. Anchor yourself with a walk in nature or by organizing a small part of your home to feel more grounded.
balance.intuition: Your intuition speaks through structure today, not just fleeting feelings. Pay attention to gut instincts about your security, both at home and in your career, as they reveal the path to long-term stability.
balance.mantra: My inner peace is the foundation of my success.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Full Moon in Capricorn casts a sober, clarifying light across your sky, Scorpio. Opposite the nurturing Cancer Sun, this lunar peak asks you to give structure to your immense feelings and voice to your deepest thoughts. With your ruler Pluto retrograde, this isn't just a fleeting mood, but a chance to rebuild your inner world with words as solid as stone.
scorpion.love: Conversations take on a serious weight today, demanding truth and accountability. A Capricorn Moon does not deal in vague promises, so speak from the core of what you know to be true. With Mercury retrograde, listen carefully to what is unsaid; the deepest connections are forged in shared silence.
scorpion.work: A project or negotiation reaches a critical culmination point, and you are called to make a definitive statement. The earthy Capricorn influence rewards discipline and realism over sheer force of will. Lay your foundations with care, for what you build today is meant to last.
scorpion.energy: The emotional tides of the Full Moon are high, yet the Capricorn influence offers an anchor. Channel your potent energy into something tangible and grounding, like physical work or organizing your space, to avoid feeling overwhelmed by the currents.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers but with the clear, resonant tone of a bell. The Full Moon illuminates a truth in your house of communication that you can no longer ignore. As Hermes Trismegistus said, 'As above, so below,' meaning the clarity you find within will soon manifest in your world.
scorpion.mantra: I build bridges with words of honest truth.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The nearly Full Moon in practical Capricorn illuminates your financial landscape, asking you to take stock of what truly supports you. While your fiery spirit yearns for the horizon, the Sun and a retrograde Mercury in Cancer pull your focus inward, to the deep currents of trust and shared resources. It is a day of balancing your material world with your emotional foundations.
sagittaire.love: Conversations about intimacy and shared responsibilities may feel like walking through old territory, thanks to Mercury's backward glance. This isn't about grand passion, but about reassessing the quiet trust that underpins your connections. True security is built on emotional honesty, not just whispered promises.
sagittaire.work: A financial matter or a long-term project reaches a point of clarity under the Capricorn Moon's stern but fair light. Your value is undeniable, but this is a time for review, not for risky investments. Scrutinize the details of any joint venture before you leap.
sagittaire.energy: The earthy lunar energy might feel more like a steady anchor than a soaring flame today. Embrace this grounding influence by connecting with the physical world- a walk, some gardening, or a nourishing meal can restore your fire.
sagittaire.intuition: Your deepest insights arise from the quiet, hidden places today. Pay attention to the subtle emotional currents between you and others, as they reveal more than any spoken word. Trust the feeling in your gut about who and what is truly nourishing for your soul.
sagittaire.mantra: I am grounded in my own true value.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The celestial spotlight finds you, Capricorn, as the Full Moon culminates in your own sign. This is a moment of profound clarity, where the structures you have so carefully built are bathed in a bright, revealing light. Opposite the Sun in your relationship sector, this lunar peak asks you to balance your personal ambitions with the emotional currents of partnership.
capricorne.love: In the realm of the heart, unspoken feelings surface under the Full Moon's gaze. With Mercury retrograde in your partnership zone, this is a time to revisit old conversations, not to assign blame, but to find a deeper understanding. True intimacy is built on the foundations of clear emotional exchange.
capricorne.work: A professional cycle reaches its peak, and your efforts are now visible for all to see. This is a time of culmination, not initiation; a moment to acknowledge how far you have climbed this particular mountain. Allow yourself to receive recognition, for it is the solid ground upon which you build your next ascent.
capricorne.energy: This lunar peak can feel like a high tide of psychic energy, potentially leaving you feeling exposed or depleted. Anchor yourself by connecting with the earth; a simple walk or time in nature can restore your Saturnian equilibrium.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers today, but in clear, structural revelations. You may suddenly see the entire architecture of a situation, understanding its past, present, and future trajectory with sober clarity.
capricorne.mantra: My inner truth illuminates my path forward.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: A powerful Full Moon crests in Capricorn, illuminating the most private corner of your sky. This is a moment of culmination and release, where a long-held secret or a subconscious burden finally surfaces to be acknowledged and let go. The Sun in your house of daily routines opposes this Moon, creating a tension between your inner world and your outer obligations.
verseau.love: Hidden emotional currents rise to the surface today, inviting a new level of honesty with yourself and a partner. This isn't about grand declarations but about the quiet understanding that dawns in a shared silence. What old relationship pattern is ready to be released into the moonlight?
verseau.work: A project may be reaching a quiet conclusion behind the scenes, or you might realize it's time to let go of an outdated professional ambition. With Mercury retrograde in your work sector, focus on revising and refining rather than launching anything new. Pay attention to the details you've previously overlooked.
verseau.energy: This lunar peak can be psychically draining, pulling your energy inward. Honor your need for solitude and rest, as your spirit is doing significant work beneath the surface.
verseau.intuition: Your intuition is your sharpest tool today, as the veil between the conscious and unconscious thins considerably. Pay close attention to your dreams and gut feelings, for they are delivering profound truths directly from your soul.
verseau.mantra: My inner world illuminates my outer path.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Full Moon rises in earthy Capricorn, casting a practical, clarifying light across your friendships and future hopes. While the Sun in fellow water-sign Cancer fills your world with creative warmth, this lunar peak asks you to see which of your dreams have solid ground beneath them, and which connections truly help you build.
poissons.love: Your heart is a deep well of feeling, but with Mercury moving backward, it is wiser to revisit old conversations than to start new ones. A need for security and emotional clarity surfaces, showing you who offers a steady hand when the tides of feeling are high.
poissons.work: This is a moment of culmination for collaborative projects, allowing you to see which group efforts are bearing fruit. Your imaginative visions are potent, but the Moon calls for them to be anchored in reality. Focus on the tangible steps that bring your ideas down to earth.
poissons.energy: The emotional high tide of the Full Moon can leave you feeling both sensitive and strangely grounded. Channel this potent energy not into scattered activity, but into a single, focused task that gives you a deep sense of accomplishment.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition is a powerful compass, especially regarding your place within your community and the tribes you belong to. Listen not only to the whispers of the unseen, but also to the profound wisdom that your own lived experience has taught you.
poissons.mantra: I build the vessel that holds my vision.
poissons.author: Sibylle
